items.raw_excerpt: The temperature fell to as low as -10.2° in the Utrecht village of Cabauw overnight, marking the first officially heavy frost of the winter. The temperature also fell to -10° in Gilze en Rijen in Noord-Brabant and Herwijnen in Gelderland, weather bureau Weeronline said on Tuesday. Coastal provinces will be hit by snow showers on Tuesday, but there may also be rain and sleet, Weeronline said. The east of the country will remain dry with plenty of sunshine and temperatures...
items.summary_en: The temperature fell to -10.2°C overnight in Cabauw, a village in Utrecht. It was the first official heavy frost of the winter. Snow showers, rain, and sleet were expected in coastal provinces.
items.summary_ko: 위트레흐트의 마을 카바우에서 밤사이 기온이 영하 10.2도까지 떨어졌습니다. 이는 올겨울 첫 공식 강한 서리였습니다. 해안 지역에는 눈 소나기와 비, 진눈깨비가 예상됐습니다.
items.title_en: Cabauw Records First Heavy Frost of Winter
items.title_ko: 카바우에서 올겨울 첫 강한 서리 기록
items.title_original: Wintry weather set to continue, more snow and heavy frosts - DutchNews.nl

items.raw_excerpt: You’ll be very glad you learned this word.

items.title_en: Italian Word of the Day: Assai

items.summary_en: Cold weather continues in southern and southeastern Brazil. This morning and tomorrow morning may bring frost in mountain areas of Rio Grande do Sul and Santa Catarina, and in southern Paraná. Low temperatures may be close to 0°C.
items.summary_ko: 브라질 남부와 남동부에 추위가 이어지고 있습니다. 오늘과 내일 아침에는 히우그란지두술과 산타카타리나 산지, 파라나 남부에 서리가 내릴 가능성이 있습니다. 최저기온은 0도 가까이 내려갈 수 있습니다.

items.summary_en: An American named Jensen is featured in a story about living in Sapporo, Hokkaido. The article says Jensen came to Japan after getting married.

items.raw_excerpt: Trousdale's General Store is one of those gems that has truly stood the test of time, outlasting even some of Canada's department stores.
items.summary_en: Trousdale's General Store is a rare local shop with a long history. It has stayed open for so long that it has outlasted some of Canada's department stores.
items.summary_ko: 트러스데일 잡화점은 오랜 역사를 간직한 드문 동네 가게다. 이 가게는 캐나다의 일부 백화점보다도 오래 살아남을 만큼 긴 시간을 버텨 왔다.

items.raw_excerpt: Born to Moroccan parents in the Netherlands, Achraf Agarmaoine is giving back to his community by focusing on children. Through his foundation, he supports youth through sports, mentorship, and community engagement,
items.summary_en: Achraf Agarmaoine was born in the Netherlands to Moroccan parents. Through his foundation, he supports children and young people with sports, mentoring, and community activities.

items.raw_excerpt: Um Familien aus dem Ausland für die Region zu gewinnen, wollen eine Privatschule und die Stadt Stollberg ein ambitioniertes Vorhaben in Angriff nehmen. Worum es geht und wie die Reaktionen ausfallen.
items.summary_en: A private school and the city of Stollberg want to build a large campus in the Ore Mountains. The plan aims to bring families from abroad to the region. The article explains the idea and local reactions.
items.summary_ko: 독일 에르츠산맥 지역의 스톨베르크시와 한 사립학교가 대형 캠퍼스 건립을 추진하고 있다. 이 계획은 해외 가족들을 지역으로 끌어들이는 것을 목표로 한다. 기사에서는 구상 내용과 지역 반응을 다룬다.
items.title_en: Small Town Plans 25 Million Euro Campus

items.raw_excerpt: Pikkukaupungissa pelätään tosissaan, että palvelut karkaavat lähikuntiin, vanhusväestö ei saa tarvitsemaansa hoitoa ja pitkäaikais­sairaudet jäävät hoitamatta.
items.summary_en: A small Finnish town is waiting for a decision on its health station. Residents fear services will move to nearby towns. Older people and people with long-term illnesses could find it harder to get care.
items.summary_ko: 핀란드의 한 소도시가 보건소 관련 결정을 기다리고 있다. 주민들은 의료 서비스가 이웃 지자체로 옮겨갈까 걱정하고 있다. 고령층과 장기 질환자들이 필요한 진료를 받기 어려워질 수 있다.
items.title_en: Small Finnish town fears health station closure

items.raw_excerpt: Dal 7 al 9 novembre 2025 appuntamento tra piazza Maggiore, piazza Minghetti e piazza Galvani, con cibo, sostenibilità, laboratori e incontri
items.summary_en: Coldiretti will hold a Farmers' Village in Bologna from November 7 to 9, 2025. The event will take place in Piazza Maggiore, Piazza Minghetti, and Piazza Galvani, with food, sustainability activities, workshops, and meetings.
items.summary_ko: 콜디레티가 2025년 11월 7일부터 9일까지 볼로냐에서 농민 마을 행사를 연다. 행사는 마조레 광장, 밍게티 광장, 갈바니 광장에서 열리며 음식, 지속가능성 활동, 워크숍, 만남의 자리가 마련된다.

items.raw_excerpt: La storia di marco Botti: «Cercavo i resti di uno sciame meteorico, ma sono saltate fuori altre cose». Il materiale consegnato al museo
items.summary_en: In Bondeno, astronomy fan Marco Botti went looking for pieces of a meteor shower. Instead, he found ancient coins and gave the material to a museum.
items.summary_ko: 이탈리아 본데노에서 천문 애호가 마르코 보티가 유성우의 흔적을 찾으러 나섰습니다. 그는 뜻밖에 고대 동전을 발견했고, 해당 자료를 박물관에 전달했습니다.

items.raw_excerpt: Der Archäologische Dienst des Kantons Bern hat auf der Baustelle des neuen BFH-Campus ein Dorf aus der Jungsteinzeit entdeckt. Die Siedlung wurde von einem heft...
items.summary_en: Archaeologists in Bern found a Neolithic village at the construction site of the new BFH campus in Biel. The settlement was discovered during building work and is about 5,800 years old.
items.summary_ko: 베른주 고고학 당국이 비엘의 새 BFH 캠퍼스 공사장에서 신석기 시대 마을을 발견했다. 이 정착지는 공사 중 확인됐으며 약 5,800년 전의 유적으로 보인다.
items.title_en: 5,800-year-old village found at Biel campus site

items.raw_excerpt: Austria’s long school summer break is nearly here, and for many families it raises the same question every year: how do you cover weeks of childcare when working life doesn’t pause with the school calendar?
items.summary_en: Austria's long school summer break is almost here. Many working parents need to find childcare for several weeks while their jobs continue.
items.summary_ko: 오스트리아의 긴 학교 여름방학이 곧 시작된다. 많은 맞벌이 부모들은 일이 계속되는 동안 몇 주간의 아이 돌봄을 어떻게 해결할지 고민하고 있다.
items.title_en: Austrian parents face long summer childcare gap
items.title_ko: 오스트리아 부모들, 긴 여름방학 돌봄 고민
items.title_original: TELL US: How do working parents in Austria cover the long summer holidays?

items.raw_excerpt: They were only surprised it wasn't named the best.
items.summary_en: Deloraine in Tasmania was named Australia's second-best town. Local people said they were not surprised. Some were only surprised it was not named the best.
items.summary_ko: 태즈메이니아의 델로레인이 호주에서 두 번째로 좋은 마을에 선정됐다. 현지 주민들은 놀랍지 않다는 반응을 보였다. 일부는 델로레인이 1위가 아니었다는 점만 의외라고 말했다.

items.raw_excerpt: San Miguel de Allende fue distinguida como ‘La Ciudad Número Número 1 de México y el Mundo’ por Travel and Leisure, convirtiéndose así en el destino por excelencia de turistas nacionales y extranjeros
items.summary_en: Travel and Leisure named San Miguel de Allende the best small city in Mexico and the world. The honor makes it a top destination for Mexican and international visitors.

items.raw_excerpt: Underwater archaeologists from India and Denmark are to investigate a 17th-century shipwreck in a bid to shed light on a little-known chapter of European involvement in South Asia.
items.summary_en: Underwater archaeologists from India and Denmark will investigate a 400-year-old shipwreck. The study may reveal a little-known part of European history in South Asia.
items.summary_ko: 인도와 덴마크의 수중 고고학자들이 400년 된 난파선을 조사한다. 이번 연구는 남아시아에서 유럽이 관여했던 잘 알려지지 않은 역사를 밝히는 데 도움이 될 수 있다.
items.title_en: Denmark and India to Study Old Shipwreck

items.raw_excerpt: Le 19 juin, l’équipementier Motoblouz, basé à Carvin (Pas-de-Calais), inaugurera sa deuxième franchise au Mo-Town Village de Vénissieux. Son ...
items.summary_en: Motorcycle gear seller Motoblouz will open a new store on June 19. The shop will be its second franchise and will be at Mo-Town Village in Vénissieux.

items.raw_excerpt: A beachcomber found a WWII German gas mask on Lombardsijde beach near Ostend, Belgium. Authorities confirmed its historical value with no safety risks.
items.summary_en: A beachcomber found a German gas mask from World War II on Lombardsijde beach near Ostend. Authorities said it had historical value and did not pose a safety risk.
items.summary_ko: 오스텐더 인근 롬바르드사이더 해변에서 해변을 걷던 사람이 2차대전 당시 독일군 방독면을 발견했습니다. 당국은 역사적 가치는 있지만 안전상 위험은 없다고 확인했습니다.
items.title_en: Beachcomber Finds WWII Gas Mask on Belgian Beach

items.raw_excerpt: Vermont residents can visit the Ethan Allen Homestead Museum for free in honor of Ethan Allen Day, marking the 250th anniversary of his address to the Continental Congress.
items.summary_en: Vermont residents can visit the Ethan Allen Homestead Museum for free on Ethan Allen Day. The day marks 250 years since Ethan Allen spoke to the Continental Congress.
items.summary_ko: 버몬트 주민들은 이선 앨런의 날을 맞아 이선 앨런 홈스테드 박물관을 무료로 방문할 수 있습니다. 이날은 이선 앨런이 대륙회의에서 연설한 지 250주년이 되는 해를 기념합니다.

items.raw_excerpt: Although Sankthans is technically on June 24th, Norwegians celebrate with bonfires marking the occasion the night before.
items.summary_en: Sankthans is Norway's midsummer celebration. It is officially on June 24, but many people mark it with bonfires on the evening before.
items.summary_ko: 산크트한스는 노르웨이의 한여름 축제입니다. 공식 날짜는 6월 24일이지만, 많은 사람들은 전날 밤 모닥불을 피우며 기념합니다.
items.title_en: Norway Marks Midsummer With Sankthans Bonfires

items.raw_excerpt: Karistaessaan pääkaupungin tomut jaloistaan suuntaavat monet helsinkiläiset mökille – Helsinkiin! Talvisaikaan Taivassalossa sijaitseva Helsinki on kuuden asukkaan uinuva kylä, mutta kesäisin sen väkimäärä moninkertaistuu.
items.summary_en: Many people from Helsinki leave the capital for cottages in summer. Some go to another Helsinki, a quiet village in Taivassalo with only six winter residents. In summer, its population grows many times over.
items.summary_ko: 여름이 되면 많은 헬싱키 사람들이 수도를 떠나 별장으로 향합니다. 그중 일부는 타이바살로에 있는 또 다른 헬싱키로 갑니다. 겨울에는 주민이 여섯 명뿐인 조용한 마을이지만, 여름에는 인구가 몇 배로 늘어납니다.
items.title_en: Summer Cottagers Fill a Tiny Helsinki
items.title_ko: 여름이면 작은 헬싱키를 채우는 별장 손님들
items.title_original: Mökkihelsinkiläiset täyttävät kesällä Helsingin - Yle
